news.t: Capital Group Launches New U.S. Growth and U.S. Value Equity ETFs For Model Portfolio Builders, and First High Yield Bond ETF

overview.description: The Capital Group High Yield Bond ETF (CGHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio with exposure to the global fixed income market. It exclusively holds high yield bonds while seeking high current income and capital appreciation. CGHY was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: 3 Great New ETFs From 2025
data.text: These exchange-traded funds offer promising new takes on old ideas.

data.title: Capital Group Launches New U.S. Growth and U.S. Value Equity ETFs For Model Portfolio Builders, and First High Yield Bond ETF
data.text: The $66B ETF manager has grown its total suite of ETFs to 25 in the U.S., with registered investment advisors comprising a fifth of its overall ETF business LOS ANGELES , June 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ --...
